ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_hour" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_round" INTEGER /* Round of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "league_year" INTEGER /* Year of the league */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee overseeing the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_year FOREIGN KEY ("league_year") REFERENCES leagues ("league_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "accuracy_rating" REAL /* Rating of the bookmaker's accuracy in predicting outcomes */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Estimated profit margin of the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "odd_type" TEXT /* Type of odd (e.g., 1X, 12, X2) */,
  "odd_value" REAL /* Value of the odd */,
  "opening_odd" REAL /* Opening value of the odd */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odd was recorded */,
  "odd_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in odds (e.g., player injury, weather conditions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the match */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_year" INTEGER /* Year of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the outcome (e.g., number of goals scored) */,
  "outcome_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the outcome (e.g., penalty shootout, extra time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
